_publications._publicationTitle: Aberrant oscillatory activity in neurofibromatosis type 1: an EEG study of resting state and working memory.

_contextSnippet: the NF1 group did not demonstrate any impairment in EEG n-back task performance (hits − false alarms (%); F(1,30) = 0.094, p = 0.762, ηp2 = 0.003)
details: Did not show significant group differences in task performance (hits - false alarms (%); F(1,30) = 0.094, p = 0.762, ηp2 = 0.003)
